impact: The worker daemon can continue on narrow, ordered PP&D progress without live crawling, authenticated DevHub automation, or retrying parked broad failures. The new tranche starts with public fixture/process coverage and syntax-first validation before any extractor implementation.
summary: Append a new fixture-first PP&D backlog tranche after the daemon exhausted all selectable tasks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
